startupCommands: cd /home/user/app && python3 -m venv .venv; .venv/bin/pip install -r backend/requirements.txt; nohup .venv/bin/python -m uvicorn backend.main:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000 --reload > .orchids/logs/backend.log 2>&1 &
cd /home/user/app/frontend && npm ci; PATH=/home/user/app/.venv/bin:$PATH VITE_PORT=4174 VITE_API_TARGET=http://127.0.0.1:8000 nohup npm run dev > /home/user/app/.orchids/logs/frontend.log 2>&1 &
